title: Dashboards
content:
Final Definition sheet

Align on priorities and unblock feature teams to build with dashboard, homepage, landing page and user page concepts

Create a solid nomenclature and usage guide for dashboards

Define what a dashboard is and isn’t

Determine the correct naming and use for observability and new graphs inside of dashboards

✅ Investigation - 2023-01-10

✅ Map all the pieces - 2023-01-13

✅ Definition of the objects - 2023-02-28 ✅ Draft by: 2023-01-31 ✅ Feedback by: 2023-02-10 ✅ Done/Done: 2023-02-28 (FFD on the 27th)

✅ Draft by: 2023-01-31

✅ Feedback by: 2023-02-10

✅ Done/Done: 2023-02-28 (FFD on the 27th)

This Working Group has the following exit criteria:

Define the component names and usage in MRs in our Pajamas documentation with an MR If needed, conduct UXR to determine the naming needs for these components If needed, perform visual style exploration to determine the definition of the component Discuss and align on each name

If needed, conduct UXR to determine the naming needs for these components

If needed, perform visual style exploration to determine the definition of the component

Discuss and align on each name

Exit with: An MR that contains a list of dashboard component names in Pajamas documentation

Roles and Responsibilities

Sr Product Manager, Foundations

Product Design Manager

Staff Product Designer

Engineering Manager, Product Analytics

Sr Frontend Engineer, Product Analytics

Sr Frontend Engineer, Product Analytics

Sr Product Designer, Monitor:Respond
